allGaps.description: ChatGPT says shadcn/ui is self-hosted, Claude says it's cloud-only. The site says both are available.

evidence.chatgptSays: shadcn/ui runs entirely on your own infrastructure, self-hosted.
evidence.claudeSays: shadcn/ui is a cloud-only SaaS with no self-hosting option.
evidence.siteContent: Deploy in the cloud or self-host. Your call.

allGaps.description: Both models describe shadcn/ui as an enterprise tool, but the site targets solo founders and small teams. Wrong buyer gets recommended.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: forWho and notForWho, with concrete team-size ranges.

evidence.chatgptSays: shadcn/ui is built for large engineering organisations and Fortune 500 teams.
evidence.claudeSays: shadcn/ui is suited to enterprise adoption with SSO and advanced RBAC.
evidence.siteContent: Built for founders and teams of 1–20. Priced accordingly.

allGaps.description: Both models claim shadcn/ui has a Slack integration that has never existed on the product.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Add Slack to NotThis until a first-party integration ships.

evidence.chatgptSays: Integrates natively with Slack for notifications and commands.
evidence.claudeSays: Supports Slack out of the box.
evidence.siteContent: Our integrations: GitHub, Linear, Figma. Slack via Zapier.

product.name: shadcn/ui
product.description: shadcn/ui — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.
product.audience: founders who already have users and want to keep them

headline.description: ChatGPT says shadcn/ui is self-hosted, Claude says it's cloud-only. The site says both are available.
headline.chatgptSays: shadcn/ui runs entirely on your own infrastructure, self-hosted.
headline.claudeSays: shadcn/ui is a cloud-only SaaS with no self-hosting option.
headline.siteContent: Deploy in the cloud or self-host. Your call.
